chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-325 of 2023 (Dhanraj Hindu Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 1513/2023 (Stay/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 20-03-2024. Mr. Shewak Ram Valencha, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ******** It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that official respondents be directed to announce schedule for conducting election of Hindu Panchait Khairpur; the affairs whereof are being run by the private respondents since long without lawful authority. If the Hindu Panchait Khairpur is registered body; then the petitioner has the remedy to exhaust for the purpose by approaching Assistant Registrar Joint Stock Companies at Sukkur; without invoking writ jurisdiction of this Court; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly together with listed application. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
